TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: unrokay ga p'asun ci na ryax, khmey ci cyoli' mwah tisal alang myan. mtenah cyamin ro myugiy myan uy. piyux ci 'nabu nya wa myan galun. kwara yaba,yaya,uba,uya ro suyan, sswe myan ga, tmwan mwah pcpung mtenah uy. ssya'an ro me'es myan ci kwara utux ryax soni.
S.PHON: unrokaj …£a p Ēas~…ēun ¶~ ®i na rjax, kńßmej ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®joli Ē mwańß tis~…ēal alaŇč mjan. mtenańß ¶~ ®jamin ro mju…£ij mjan uj. pijux ¶~ ®i Ēnaő≤u nja wa mjan …£alun. kwara jaő≤a,jaja,uő≤a,uja ro s~…ēujan, s~…ēs~…ēwe mjan …£a, tmwan mwańß p ¶~ ®puŇč mtenańß uj. s~…ēs~…ēja Ēan ro me Ēes~…ē mjan ¶~ ®i kwara utux rjax s~…ēoni.
S.FORM: unrokay ga p'asun ci na ryax, khmey ci cyoli' mwah tisal alang myan. mtenah cyamin ro myugiy myan uy. piyux ci 'nabu nya wa myan galun. kwara yaba,yaya,uba,uya ro suyan, sswe myan ga, tmwan mwah pcpung mtenah uy. ssya'an ro me'es myan ci kwara utux ryax soni.
